title: A14 'both dispatch paths' not exercised end-to-end in W6
body: spec.md A14 requires Agent-tool dispatch AND `claude -p --model` dispatch verification. Tasks 17-23 cover resolver stdout + tier counts but no task asserts commands/spec-review.md passes model:opus to Agent tool AND scripts/autorun/spec-review.sh passes --model claude-opus-4-5 to claude -p for the same selection.
suggested_fix: Add wiring assertion to task 17 (grep tasks 9-14 outputs for expected model: / --model token under tag×budget fixture) or add task 17b.

title: A11 stale-tags warning has no dedicated test fixture
body: Task 17 mentions stale-tags as matrix axis but no fixture unit-tests the drift heuristic itself (≥1 enum delta between recorded tags: and _tag_baseline.py recompute).
suggested_fix: Add fixture pair to test-tag-baseline.sh (task 21): recorded [data] + spec content matching auth → warning fires; recorded [security,data] + same content → no warning.

title: A15 constitution-rename ACs not flagged as verified-by-sibling-spec
body: Plan D11 carves constitution rename to monsterflow-pipeline-config-rename, but A15 is silently dropped from local AC coverage.
suggested_fix: Append one-line note to D11: 'A15 is verified at sibling-spec monsterflow-pipeline-config-rename /check; this spec leaves all constitution.md references as-is.'

title: AC A4c (Codex policy modes) has no dedicated task; three modes not enumerated
body: Spec demands fixtures (a) additive+auth → runs, (b) additive+no-auth → silently skipped, (c) disabled+auth → never runs. Plan task 17 has Codex axis but does not enumerate sub-cases.
suggested_fix: Name the three Codex modes in task 17's test-matrix description so build agent doesn't ship only additive+auth.

title: PRE-W2 evidence file referenced but not declared an artifact deliverable
body: plan.md L68 + Open Q#1 mention plan/dispatch-precedence-evidence.md. Wrapper-pivot branch appends on every run. Plan never says who creates the file shell (header schema, columns, append discipline).
suggested_fix: One-line schema in task 0: 'header: date | invocation | --model arg | response model-id | match Y/N'.

title: Edge Case 23 / SEC-04 has no negative test fixture
body: D8 + task 6 implement the drift check; task 21 covers baseline computation but not the drift-halt path.
suggested_fix: Extend test-tag-baseline.sh: fixture where recorded baseline is [] but recomputed contains security → assert TagDriftError raised and resolver exits non-zero.

title: Task 17 deps 'W4' shorthand; should resolve to numeric 9-14
body: Wave-name shorthand vs numeric-task-id convention used elsewhere in table. Slicer could misread as 'task W4' or 'any W4 task'.
suggested_fix: Change task 17 deps from 'W4' to '9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14' for unambiguous orchestration.

title: Task 23 legacy fixture should add dep on task 16
body: Open Q#3 legacy-fixture test exercises task 16's defensive read; currently task 23 can run before task 16 lands.
suggested_fix: Add 16 to task 23 deps, or split legacy fixture into a dedicated test sequenced after W5.

title: Wrapper-script response-shape parsing unspecified
body: Open Q#1 (a) says wrapper parses response and fail-fasts on model-id mismatch but never pins WHERE model-id lives. CLI versions differ.
suggested_fix: PRE-W2 evidence file must capture actual JSON path; wrapper must pin --output-format json explicitly. Test fixture mocks CLI-version drift response and asserts fail-closed.

title: fit_tags author-drift has no CI lint
body: Slice 1 backfilled 19 personas. A 20th persona with invalid fit_tags (auth instead of security) won't be caught until a gate dispatches it.
suggested_fix: Add task to W6 (or fold into task 23) validating every personas/*/*.md fit_tags value against closed enum at test time.

title: tier_pin accumulate semantics not provably idempotent
body: Multiple CLI flags promoting/demoting could oscillate if applied sequentially with state mutation between each.
suggested_fix: D14 must specify 'batch-apply: collect all pins, then run single drop-pass against non-pinned non-security cohort sorted by combined_score asc.' Task 18 fixture includes 3-pin batch to assert determinism.

title: SEC-04 recompute latency cost unmeasured
body: _tag_baseline.py runs at every gate dispatch (3 gates × N personas). I/O alone could push past 500ms on cold filesystem.
suggested_fix: Task 21 perf fixture asserting compute_baseline() returns <100ms for representative spec (≥10K chars). Wire into A18 budget.

title: Mid-pipeline spec.md edit undefined when recomputed < recorded
body: Subset assertion safe additively (new keywords added by edit) but inverse case (edit removes baseline-detected security keyword) is unspecified.
suggested_fix: D8 needs explicit clause for recomputed < recorded case: warn-and-proceed (author intentionally edited content out) per Edge Case 4 stale-tags pattern.

title: Task 22 (test-explain-mutation-zero.sh) → CUT entirely
body: Tests SEC-03/A23 for --explain flag, but --explain carved to sibling pipeline-resolver-debugging. No --explain in MVP to assert against.
suggested_fix: Remove task 22 from W6. Move A23 + test to sibling spec.

title: Task 23 legacy selection.json fixture over-engineered
body: selection.json produced and consumed by code shipping in same PR. No in-the-wild pre-tier files exist.
suggested_fix: Cut the legacy-fixture sub-bullet from task 23. Defensive read in task 16 stays.

title: Open Q#1 wrapper-pivot pre-design over-specified
body: Plan pre-designs 5-requirement wrapper for probe outcome that hasn't happened. If PRE-W2 fails, right move is halt + follow-up spec.
suggested_fix: Replace lines 148-155 with: 'If probe fails, halt /build and file follow-up spec; do not in-line a fallback design here.'

title: D14 --tier-pin accumulate semantics invented
body: Spec.md:89 shows only single-flag usage; accumulation + promote + drop-lowest is small algorithm interacting with SEC-01.
suggested_fix: Pick last-wins for v1 and revisit if a user actually hits the limitation. See BACKLOG.md.

title: PRE-W2 evidence-file artifact heavy for one-shot probe
body: Persistent .md artifact (re-appending on every wrapper run) is heavy for a one-shot decision.
suggested_fix: Inline-assert probe outcome in PR description or commit message; only persist if wrapper pivot fires.

title: fit_score == len(intersection) invariant not pinned
body: D1, spec.md A1. Task 18 covers tier-assignment math but no test asserts integer identity over parameterized table.
suggested_fix: Add fixture row to test-tier-resolver.sh (task 18) asserting fit_score == |spec.tags ∩ persona.fit_tags| over (e.g., spec_tags=[security,data,api] × persona.fit_tags=[security,api] → fit_score=2).

title: Task 23 'loads without error' assertion too loose
body: Per feedback_unverified_commands, 'loads without error' doesn't distinguish 'rendered N/A' from 'silently dropped row.'
suggested_fix: Tighten to: judge-dashboard-bundle.py on legacy selection.json emits tier_mix:N/A sentinel for that row AND exits 0 AND feature appears in bundle. Cite exact output string.

title: Wrapper-script pivot has zero test coverage
body: Open Q#1 (a) requires ≤30 lines, runtime model-id assertion, append-on-run, fail-fast. None has a test task.
suggested_fix: Add conditional test-dispatch-wrapper.sh (skip-if-not-pivoted) covering (a) wrapper exists ≤30 lines, (b) wrapper rejects when response model-id ≠ --model, (c) each run appends to dispatch-precedence-evidence.md.

title: PRE-W2 evidence artifact has no assertion target in W6
body: Task 0 writes plan/dispatch-precedence-evidence.md but no W6 task reads it. The gate's outcome can rot silently.
suggested_fix: Add fixture in test-dynamic-roster.sh asserting (a) file exists, (b) contains YES/NO/FLAKY verdict line, (c) chosen dispatch mode in commands/*.md Phase 0b matches verdict.

title: AST-banlist scope only enforced on _tag_baseline.py
body: Task 21(g) banlists ast/eval/exec/subprocess/socket for _tag_baseline.py. Plan does not extend to _persona_score.py or _tier_assign.py, which also consume author-controlled content.
suggested_fix: Extend banlist test (or duplicate) to assert all three _*.py helpers parse clean — same banlist applied uniformly.

title: Plan task 8 instruction to drop A20 is mistargeted (A20 != tag-inference)
body: Caught during Slice 4 Wave 4a build (commands/spec.md task 8 agent). Plan task 8 says "Drop A20 from the spec AC list (A20 was the placeholder for this flow; the implementation IS A20)." But spec.md:518 A20 is actually "Pipeline cycle through itself ... deferred — chicken-and-egg," unrelated to /spec Phase 3 tag inference. The tag-inference AC is A12 (spec.md:502), already present and unchanged. Acting on the plan instruction literally would delete an unrelated deferred dogfood AC. Logged as docs-only per user direction on 2026-05-12; leave A20 in spec.md as-is. Caveat: schema followups.schema.json does not have a build-sourced source_gate value; tagged source_gate=check to satisfy schema regex, but the actual catch came from /build wave-4a.
suggested_fix: Plan revision pass should reconcile task 8 wording with the actual AC numbering. Either: (a) re-target task 8 to A12 (the real tag-inference AC) if A12 needs to be marked done, (b) leave A12 unchanged and remove the "Drop A20" instruction entirely from task 8, or (c) confirm A20 (pipeline-cycle-through-itself dogfood) really is intended to be dropped and that the rationale should be rewritten.
